segments.text: Today is the happiest day for all of you,
For whole universe because Shri Ganesha was created.
He was created to emit auspiciousness through His Chaitanya
First The Whole Cosmos was filled with this Chaitanyashrt
Then Brahmadeva came into play and He created all the matter.
But, The greatest blessings of divine power was to symbolize Chaitanya
And this chaitanya has many aspects but specially in Sri Ganesha it is auspiciousness
In these modern times people have lost the sense of auspiciousness.
Everything that emits vibrations, chaitanya is auspicious – it's shubh and whatever
does not…is not by any chance auspicious so first for all what ever you worshiped
whatever you accept, all of them have to be auspicious things.
Every shape has a co-efficient and
All these shapes which
You see not necessarily give vibrations but in the human beings also
we find there are many people like
you who have chaitanya flowing in them.
But this Chaitanya when it flows, we just take Shri Ganesha for granted – We do not
understand that to awaken Shri Ganesh within us means what?
What is there already existing inside of You and as I said innocence cannot be lost
So Shri Ganesha is eternal being, eternal child.
He cannot be lost and he can not destroyed so his all the time there may some clouds
of your ill-doings are covering great personality of innocence but it always their present
So, now what should we do to keep this Ganesha all the time shining within us is first remember
that you were made in same pattern as Shri Ganesh.
But His Kundalini on his stomach!
His pure desire is on his stomach.
It's very significant to understand why it there that, His Kundalini Is On His Stomach
That means He does not have conquer the temptations of Mooladhara at all but he has His kundalini
on his stomach.
That means he is also beyond the temptations of food, power or anything because His stomach
represents absolute abandonment and freedom He's not bothered as to how He looks that
these days there a big fashion where you cannot have a belly I mean this becoming
a big, not only fashion but also business.
But as age grows you have to help even small children and they look so sweet those people
who are very thin must understand that there might be getting some prizes in the
maybe beauty contest or something .But ,they do no thave that majesty that royalty
that dignity in them as they should have.
So Shri Ganesha accepts everything, he has a head with a trunk and he accepts it of course
is important because the head of elephant suggests not like human being who develops
ego super-ego conditionings but He's just all time one
with the Divine. He accepts His body, He accepts His head
he accepts his ears, he accepts everything that is made of
.He doesn't aspire to something
some entrepreneurs put ideas and even go run after them
,he won´t try change himself
or create fashion
and all that.
He is what he's because, he is a satisfied soul!
The Kundalini on the stomach shows complete self-contented, satisfied personality of
Shri Ganesha.
When you have your powers within yourself – when You know Your are powerful then
And you don't hanker after all these things.
You do not try to make a position or an impression of others, for example he would never go
and read books like How To Impress People – very common!
So now as we are created in the same image of Shri Ganesha ,you have understand that
You have to accept whatever God has given you, whatever position He's giving.
Same with Christ!
Christ accepted His Father who was just a carpenter – he didn't aspire for something
higher or some sort of special position and power because He is so powerful what
more Power can be had?
Though people mocked at Him laughed at him could not accept What He said but
But still he was self-contented, self satisfied.
He knew what it is so for a Sahaja Yogi first thing to be self contented as I told you
the fundamentals of Western life are see and to be seen both things were missing completely
in the incarnation of Shri Ganesha.
So when I say these things, suddenly people start thinking let us become hippies or let
them be punks.
Let's just come this and that you don't have to become anything whatever your body
is, face , hair everything it there just meant for You .You dont' haveto change
anything outwardly, because inside is complete chaitanya.
Shri Ganesha never tried to change Himself though there were so many clouds on His being
– though Many people insulted Him tortured him hanged Him crucified He still the eternal
So the first and foremost thing for a Sahaja Yogi is to accept, go on accepting things.
But when I say except –I must say that other side also–that doesn't mean you start
accepting booths or all bad qualities of others.
Mother! You said we should accept so they started accepting these bad qualities.
What's wrong? You have said it already.
Whatever I say has another side always, like I said now you have become your own guru.
So why should we listen to anybody else?
Like this see!
We go on diverting ourselves deviating our selves from reality just cheat us and
And this comes because we have no wisdom.
We do not know what is for our benevolence, and even if you don't want to do it so
So what we lack is wisdom.
Now it's a vicious circle I must say that Ganesha has to be awakened, he'll give you
wisdom – He' s the giver of wisdom and HE has
to give you the wisdom, he is to be awakened.
But You are not wise because He's not awakened – it' s a very vicious circle!
How do I make this vicious circle break that let My Wisdom shine in my attention?
Let Shri Ganesha throw His light into my attention?"
Maybe you people are very alert, no doubt.
And You can always cheat yourself nicely!
That's the point where you could see Yourself introspection which I have seen among Russians

Why cannot meditate am going to miss out?
